examples: Look at Borneo, where you instantly think of the orang-utans.
The last time Emily Bland met Rishi the orang-utan, they were both still at the crawling stage.
WHEN it comes to researching intelligence in primates, chimpanzees and orang-utans get all the attention.
Manoj's winning picture, taken in Indonesia, shows a young orang-utan in its mother's arms.
Facial expressions, such as the open, gaping mouth resembling laughter, were picked up and copied by orang-utans.
